title: Interface delays cause too many arguments in function call to TASK

features.name: task call through interface instance
features.description: Code should include a task call invoked through an interface instance using dot notation

features.name: non_blocking_assignment_in_initial
features.description: Code should include a non-blocking assignment (<=) inside an initial block

features.name: interface_instance_with_timing
features.description: Code should include an interface instance combined with timing control constructs
features.snippet:
interface jtag_if; task cycle_dr_32(output [31:0] data, input [31:0] tdido); #1; endtask endinterface
module top(); jtag_if jtag(); initial #0 jtag.cycle_dr_32(d, i); endmodule
